sidebar.projectEmpty: Create or select a file to start
sidebar.archiveConfirmBody: "{{title}}" moves to this project's Archived group. Nothing is deleted.
sidebar.deleteConfirmBody: "{{title}}" will be permanently deleted from the agent's history.

hero.title: Let's take something off your plate

composer.mentionPastChatsHint: Bring an earlier conversation as context
composer.mentionSymbolsHint: Point the agent at a workspace symbol
composer.mentionSymbolsEmpty: No symbols found. The language server may still be warming up
composer.shellHint: Enter runs this in the project shell; the output stays in the conversation
composer.shellBusyHint: The agent is busy: wait for the turn to finish to run a shell command

queue.hint: The agent is busy: Enter adds this prompt to the queue

chat.visionRelayFailed: Vision relay failed. The image could not be described; try again or pick a vision-capable model.
chat.visionRelayNoModel: No vision-capable model available to describe the image. Pick one in Settings or switch the chat model.

errors.sendFailed: The message wasn't sent; your text was kept as a draft

chat.truncated: Reply was cut short by the model's length limit
chat.reconnecting: Connection to the agent dropped; reconnecting

context.usage: About {{percent}}% of the context window used (estimated from the last turn)

revert.confirmBody: Messages from this point on will be discarded and the agent's file changes will be rolled back.
revert.noFiles: No file changes to roll back.
revert.activeBannerNoCount: Conversation restored to an earlier point.

edit.confirmBody: The conversation will be restored to before this message and its text will return to the composer.

deleteMsg.confirmBody: This removes your last message and the replies after it. File changes are not rolled back.

permissions.title: Saved permissions
permissions.subtitle: Rules created when you answer "Allow always" on a request. Revoking one makes the agent ask again.
permissions.emptyBody: Answer "Allow always" on a permission request and the rule shows up here.
permissions.revokeConfirmBody: The agent will ask again the next time it needs this.

diff.title: Session changes
diff.noPatch: No textual diff for this file

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Reusable skills the agent can load on demand, discovered from opencode, Claude, and metacodex.
skills.emptyBody: Add Agent Skills to ~/.config/opencode/skills or ~/.claude/skills and they show up here.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.subtitle: Connect Model Context Protocol servers to give the agent extra tools. Changes apply after the agent restarts.
mcp.emptyBody: Add a local (command) or remote (URL) MCP server and its tools become available to the agent.

featured.brave: Web search by Brave. Paste a Brave Search API key to enable it.
featured.exa: Semantic web search by Exa. Paste an Exa API key to enable it.

mcp.restartNote: MCP changes apply after the agent restarts.
mcp.removeConfirmBody: "{{name}}" is removed from the agent; any API key stored for it is deleted.
mcp.dialogDescription: Values shown as {{sentinel}} are stored secrets; leave them as-is to keep them.
mcp.nameInvalid: Lowercase letters, digits, '-' and '_' only; must start with a letter or digit.

scheduled.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduled.subtitle: Let the agent run a prompt on a cron schedule. Tasks fire while metacodex is open.

dialog.name: Name
dialog.cronHint: Standard cron expression, in your local time.
dialog.fromChatPlaceholder: Describe the task and when it should run...
dialog.fromChatHint: AI fills the fields below. Review and save.
dialog.generateError: Could not read that. Rephrase or fill it in manually.
dialog.agentHint: With an agent, the run uses its persona, memory and permission preset, and lands in its activity log.

card.openRun: Open the last run as a chat

scheduled.deleteBody: "{{name}}" will be removed. This cannot be undone.

customize.title: Customize
customize.subtitle: Extend what the agent can do: skills, MCP servers, permissions, and tools.

tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: Built-in tools the agent can use during a run.
tools.emptyTitle: Tool controls are on the way
tools.emptyBody: Soon you will be able to enable or disable individual tools for the agent here.

settings.title: Agent runtime
settings.description: The opencode engine behind the Agent View, plus the models from your subscription.
settings.apiKeyHint: Paste your opencode subscription key to list and use every model it includes. Held by the engine, never in the browser.
settings.apiKeyDetectedHint: Your existing opencode login was detected automatically. Paste a key only to replace the current credential.
settings.cliMissing: Not found on PATH. Install it with: {{command}}
settings.defaultModelHint: Used for new chats and tasks.
settings.noModels: No models yet. Add your GO key above.
settings.visionModelHint: Describes images for chat models that can't see them (vision relay).
settings.modelsDescription: Choose which models appear in the composer's model picker. By default only the opencode GO models show; enable any other model the engine has mapped.

onboarding.missingBody: metacodex drives a local opencode engine for chat, scheduled tasks, and MCP tools. It wasn't found on your PATH. Install it, then try again:
onboarding.failedBody: opencode is installed but the local server failed to start.
onboarding.codeStillWorks: The Code view works without it. Already logged into opencode? Your credentials are picked up automatically.

permission.askDesc: Approve every edit, command, and network call.
permission.auto-editDesc: Edits run freely; commands and network still ask.
permission.full-autoDesc: Run everything without asking. Use with care.

createProject.title: Create project
createProject.nameInvalid: Folder name can't contain / \ or be . or ..
createProject.errExists: A folder named "{{name}}" already exists there.

branch.nameInvalid: Use letters, numbers and / _ - . (no leading dash, no "..").

md.externalLinkWarning: You're about to open an external website.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Reusable agents with their own persona, model and permissions. Each one lives in ~/.metacodex/agents.
agents.emptyBody: Create an agent with its own persona, model and permissions, then pick it in the composer.
agents.deleteConfirmBody: "{{name}}" and its whole home directory (persona, memory, logs) will be permanently deleted.

builder.describePlaceholder: e.g. A meticulous code reviewer for my TypeScript projects, direct tone, focused on security
builder.describeHint: Generate prefills the form for review. Nothing is saved until you hit Save.
builder.generateError: Couldn't draft an agent from that. Try rephrasing.
builder.name: Name
builder.personaHint: The agent's system prompt: identity, expertise, working style, rules.

memory.pickFile: Pick a file on the left to read or edit it.
memory.emptyHint: Nothing here yet. The agent writes its own memory while it works; you can also edit these files by hand.
memory.loadFailed: Couldn't load this memory. Try again.
memory.saveFailed: Couldn't save the file. Try again.
memory.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete the file. Try again.
memory.deleteConfirmBody: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted from the agent's memory.
memory.discardBody: You edited "{{name}}" and didn't save. Switching files discards those changes.

activity.emptyBody: Reports and the run log show up here once the agent runs on its own (scheduled tasks, heartbeat, dreams).

proposals.emptyBody: During a dream the agent may propose improvements to its own persona or skills. They wait here for your approval; nothing is ever self-applied.
proposals.reasonPlaceholder: Why? (becomes a memory so it won't re-propose)
proposals.appliesPersona: Approving applies the proposed persona to AGENT.md.
proposals.resolveFailed: Couldn't apply the decision. Try again.

agenda.heartbeatHint: Periodic pulse: the agent checks its HEARTBEAT.md checklist and acts only if something needs it.
agenda.saveFailed: Couldn't save the schedule settings. Try again.
agenda.heartbeatFileHint: What the agent checks on every heartbeat. Edit it like a to-do list.
agenda.noCrons: None yet. Assign a task to this agent in Scheduled Tasks.

sendToProject.title: Send to project
sendToProject.subtitle: Move "{{name}}" into a project folder.
sendToProject.noProjects: Add a project first to move files into it.

welcome.tagline: A quiet, local-first workspace for code, with a real native terminal and your favourite AI coding CLIs one keystroke away.
welcome.localFirstBody: Projects stay on disk. metacodex only stores workspace metadata.
welcome.realPtyBody: Same shell as Terminal.app, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Antigravity.

projectEmpty.tagline: Nothing open yet. Start a terminal, or hand it to an AI agent.

general.title: General
general.languageHint: The interface language. Applies instantly across the app.
general.projectStorageHint: metacodex never modifies your folders on disk.
general.saveWorkspaceHint: Open tabs and expanded folders restore on relaunch.
general.restoreTerminalsHint: Terminal sessions are never auto-respawned on relaunch, by design.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.modeHint: Light / dark preference. Picking a theme below syncs this automatically.

interface.title: Interface
interface.description: Tweak which surfaces and agents are visible in the workspace.
interface.iconStyleHint: Monochrome follows the theme. Colored paints brand-known files with their canonical color.
interface.layoutHint: Horizontal keeps open items in the top tab bar. Vertical hides it and drives the center pane from the sidebar (Codex-style).
interface.densityHint: Flexes spacing globally. Compact for dense data, spacious for breathing room.
interface.launcherVisibilityHint: Choose which agents appear in the + menu. Hidden agents stay installed and can still be launched from a terminal.

editor.title: Editor
editor.fontFamilyHint: Monospace font for the code editor.
editor.stickyScrollHint: Max enclosing scopes pinned at the top while scrolling. 0 turns it off.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.fontFamilyHint: Monospace font for the terminal. Nerd Fonts render TUI icons.
terminal.scrollbackHint: Lines of history kept per terminal. Lowering it fully applies to new terminals.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: How metacodex signals you when an agent finishes a task or asks for input. Tab badges are always on; the toggles below control the louder surfaces.
notifications.osNotificationsHint: Show a system banner when an agent in the background finishes or requests your attention.
notifications.soundHint: Play a short chime alongside the banner.
notifications.notifyWhenFocusedHint: Off: when metacodex is active and the affected tab is selected, only the tab dot lights up, no banner. On: always show the banner.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Click a shortcut to rebind it. Conflicts are flagged before they apply.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.saveDebounceHint: Milliseconds to wait before persisting layout changes.
advanced.searchDebounceHint: Milliseconds to wait after typing before searching.

cli.title: CLI Registry
cli.description: AI coding CLIs available from the + menu.
cli.overridesNote: Custom CLI overrides will land in a future release. For now, edit <0>{{file}}</0> and restart.

about.title: About
about.tagline: A quiet, local-first workspace for code, with a real native terminal and your favourite AI coding CLIs one keystroke away.
about.author: crafted by
about.devNoUpdates: Updates are disabled in dev mode

cli.notInstalledTooltip: Not installed. Click to open install help.

explorer.title: Explorer
explorer.noProjectBody: Open a local folder to browse files. Your folders stay on disk, metacodex only stores workspace metadata.

search.title: Search in project
search.openToSearch: Open a project to search inside it.
search.typeToSearch: Type to search file contents in the current project.

projectRail.removeDescription: This only removes the project from your workspace. The folder on disk is not affected.
projectRail.removeBodySuffix: will be removed from the rail.

menu.imageHint: Use the project favicon or another image.

rename.title: Rename project
rename.description: Renames the project inside metacodex. The folder on disk is not affected.
rename.label: Project name

resume.titleProject: Pick up where you left off in {{name}}
resume.titleGlobal: Pick up where you left off
resume.confirmDiscardBody: It will no longer appear in resume lists. The agent's own history (if any) is not touched.

appShell.deleteFileDescription: The file will be deleted from disk. This action cannot be undone.
appShell.deleteFolderDescription: The folder and all of its contents will be deleted from disk. This action cannot be undone.
appShell.closeAgentDescription: The agent session is active. Any in-progress response will be discarded.
appShell.closeTerminalDescription: The session is active. The running process will be stopped and this tab's history lost.
appShell.closeManyDescription_one: {{inventory}} will be stopped. Running processes will be terminated and in-progress responses discarded.
appShell.closeManyDescription_other: {{inventory}} will be stopped. Running processes will be terminated and in-progress responses discarded.

terminal.piNotConfigured: Pi CLI is not configured yet.
terminal.piNotConfiguredBody: Add the install command and executable name in the metacodex CLI registry.
terminal.lookup: metacodex asks your login shell for <0>{{command}}</0> via <1>{{detect}}</1>.

exitBanner.readerError: Terminal I/O failed: output above may be truncated.

editor.binaryBody: This file looks binary. metacodex MVP only edits text files.
editor.externalDeleted: This file was removed on disk.
editor.externalChanged: Modified on disk outside the editor.

sourceControl.title: Source Control
sourceControl.noProject: Open a project to see its changes.

worktrees.title: Worktrees
worktrees.empty: No worktrees yet. Use the + to spin one up for an agent.
worktrees.abandonBody: The worktree directory and its checkout will be removed. Unpushed commits on this branch will be lost.

dialog.title: New worktree for {{cli}}
dialog.description: A worktree is a parallel checkout of this repo. The agent can edit, run tests, and commit on a different branch without disturbing your main checkout.
dialog.branchHint: Created if it doesn't exist yet. Reused if it does.
dialog.baseHint: Where the new branch starts from. HEAD is the current branch.
dialog.branchInvalid: Branch name can only contain letters, numbers, dots, dashes, slashes and underscores.

merge.title: Merge {{branch}}
merge.description: Merge this worktree's branch into the project's current HEAD.

strategy.ffOnlyHint: Safe. Only works if the histories already line up linearly.
strategy.mergeHint: Creates a merge commit, preserving the branch's history.
strategy.squashHint: Collapses every change into a single commit on HEAD.

cloneFromGithub.title: Clone from GitHub
cloneFromGithub.description: Paste a repository URL. metacodex clones it locally and opens it as a project.

errors.nameInvalid: Folder name cannot contain slashes or special characters.
errors.authFailed: Private repository. Set up SSH or run `gh auth login` in a terminal, then try again.
errors.notFound: Repository not found. Check the URL.
errors.destExists: A folder named "{{name}}" already exists in {{parent}}.
errors.network: Could not reach the remote. Check your connection and try again.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostic log
diagnostics.empty: No events yet. Toggle with Cmd+Shift+D.
